verdict: A brightening serum with clinically proven alpha arbutin at optimal 2% concentration for hyperpigmentation and uneven tone. Layerable formula with exceptional tolerability.

_research.name: The Ordinary Alpha Arbutin 2% + HA
pros: Dual hyaluronic acid system for hydration
_research.con: Results are gradual (8+ weeks) and modest compared to prescription-strength brighteners.
